summary: High‑quality audience recording captured with a mk41 Schoeps mic, hailed as the best source despite no musical commentary.
review: The reviewer compares three audience sources and favors this mk41 Schoeps capture for its solid sound and complete show length. While no specific comments on the performance are given, the technical impression is clearly positive, marking it as a preferred listening option among available recordings.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review focused on audio source quality; it praises the recording but offers no insight into musical performance, limiting confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes solid sound from Hecht AKG 330 pull and decent Suraci NAK 304, preferring the mk41 Schoeps mic for its fuller capture and full‑show availability.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details provided in reviews.
